captcha_note: reCAPTCHA check is pure client-side JS. Server does NOT validate the token. No captcha handling needed.
pdf_download_note: PDF images are paywalled via clerkecertify.com (SubscriberCode 510 = purchase required). No free download endpoint available.
party_type_note: Leon custom portal does not support party-type filtering in the search URL. Returns both grantor and grantee matches.
probe_notes: Probed 2026-06-18. lforms.leonclerk.com is a proprietary classic-ASP portal. GET search.asp?action=mainsearch returns DataTables HTML. reCAPTCHA is client-side only — server does not validate token. Reachable from datacenter egress (no anti-bot).
